action_mappings_indef.release_analyst_from_ticket: release a reconciliation analyst {} from a repair ticket {}

predicate_mappings.ticket_assignment_flag: the ticket assignment flag for {} is set
predicate_mappings.ticket_linked_general_ledger_account: {} is linked to general ledger account {}
predicate_mappings.ticket_supporting_document_attached_flag: supporting document attached flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.ticket_batch_link_candidate: {} is a candidate for linking to {}
predicate_mappings.ticket_candidate_analyst: {} is a candidate for the analyst {}

predicate_mappings.ticket_can_link_counterparty_account: {} can be linked to the counterparty account {}

preconditions: I can only register a repair ticket A if it is not the case that the ticket A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I register a repair ticket A, it is the case that the ticket A is registered

assign_analyst_to_ticket.description: assign a reconciliation analyst B to a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only assign a reconciliation analyst B to a repair ticket A if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the analyst B
I can only assign a reconciliation analyst B to a repair ticket A if it is not the case that the ticket assignment flag for A is set
effects: Once I assign a reconciliation analyst B to a repair ticket A, it is the case that the ticket A is assigned to the analyst B and the ticket assignment flag for A is set
Once I assign a reconciliation analyst B to a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_analyst_from_ticket.description: release a reconciliation analyst B from a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only release a reconciliation analyst B from a repair ticket A if it is the case that the ticket A is assigned to the analyst B
I can only release a reconciliation analyst B from a repair ticket A if it is not the case that the validation passed flag for A and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I release a reconciliation analyst B from a repair ticket A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a reconciliation analyst B from a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that the ticket A is assigned to the analyst B and it is not the case anymore that the ticket assignment flag for A is set and it is not the case anymore that A is validated by reference and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for proposal and it is not the case anymore that A has been escalated and it is not the case anymore that approval has been granted for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional evidence

link_system_reference_to_ticket.description: link a system reference B to a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only link a system reference B to a repair ticket A if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I link a system reference B to a repair ticket A, it is the case that A is linked to the system reference B
Once I link a system reference B to a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_system_reference_from_ticket.description: unlink a system reference B from a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only unlink a system reference B from a repair ticket A if it is the case that A is linked to the system reference B
effects: Once I unlink a system reference B from a repair ticket A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a system reference B from a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the system reference B

validate_ticket_with_system_reference.description: validate a repair ticket A with a system reference B
preconditions: I can only validate a repair ticket A with a system reference B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is linked to the system reference B
I can only validate a repair ticket A with a system reference B if it is not the case that A is validated by reference
effects: Once I validate a repair ticket A with a system reference B, it is the case that A is validated by reference

validate_ticket_with_counterparty_respon.description: validate a repair ticket A with a counterparty response B
preconditions: I can only validate a repair ticket A with a counterparty response B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and B is available
I can only validate a repair ticket A with a counterparty response B if it is not the case that A is validated by reference
effects: Once I validate a repair ticket A with a counterparty response B, it is the case that A is validated by reference and A has been escalated
Once I validate a repair ticket A with a counterparty response B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

attach_supporting_document_and_mark_read.description: attach a supporting document C to a repair ticket A and mark a repair ticket A as ready for proposal with a system reference B
preconditions: I can only attach a supporting document C to a repair ticket A and mark a repair ticket A as ready for proposal with a system reference B if it is the case that A is validated by reference and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is linked to the system reference B and C is available
I can only attach a supporting document C to a repair ticket A and mark a repair ticket A as ready for proposal with a system reference B if it is not the case that A is ready for proposal
effects: Once I attach a supporting document C to a repair ticket A and mark a repair ticket A as ready for proposal with a system reference B, it is the case that A is ready for proposal
Once I attach a supporting document C to a repair ticket A and mark a repair ticket A as ready for proposal with a system reference B, it is not the case anymore that A has been escalated

attach_proposed_correction_via_batch_con.description: attach proposed correction to a repair ticket A via batch confirmation with a settlement batch B
preconditions: I can only attach proposed correction to a repair ticket A via batch confirmation with a settlement batch B if it is the case that the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is confirmed for linking to B
I can only attach proposed correction to a repair ticket A via batch confirmation with a settlement batch B if it is not the case that A is ready for proposal
effects: Once I attach proposed correction to a repair ticket A via batch confirmation with a settlement batch B, it is the case that A is ready for proposal
Once I attach proposed correction to a repair ticket A via batch confirmation with a settlement batch B, it is not the case anymore that A has been escalated

link_general_ledger_account_to_ticket.description: link a repair ticket A to a general ledger account B
preconditions: I can only link a repair ticket A to a general ledger account B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available and A can be linked to the general ledger account B
effects: Once I link a repair ticket A to a general ledger account B, it is the case that A is linked to general ledger account B
Once I link a repair ticket A to a general ledger account B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_general_ledger_account_from_ticke.description: unlink a repair ticket A from a general ledger account B
preconditions: I can only unlink a repair ticket A from a general ledger account B if it is the case that A is linked to general ledger account B
effects: Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a general ledger account B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a general ledger account B, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to general ledger account B

link_counterparty_account_to_ticket.description: link a repair ticket A to a counterparty account B
preconditions: I can only link a repair ticket A to a counterparty account B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available and A can be linked to the counterparty account B
effects: Once I link a repair ticket A to a counterparty account B, it is the case that A is linked to counterparty account B
Once I link a repair ticket A to a counterparty account B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_counterparty_account_from_ticket.description: unlink a repair ticket A from a counterparty account B
preconditions: I can only unlink a repair ticket A from a counterparty account B if it is the case that A is linked to counterparty account B
effects: Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a counterparty account B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a counterparty account B, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to counterparty account B

link_payment_instrument_to_ticket.description: link a repair ticket A to a payment instrument B
preconditions: I can only link a repair ticket A to a payment instrument B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available and A can be linked to the payment instrument B
effects: Once I link a repair ticket A to a payment instrument B, it is the case that A is linked to payment instrument B
Once I link a repair ticket A to a payment instrument B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_payment_instrument_from_ticket.description: unlink a repair ticket A from a payment instrument B
preconditions: I can only unlink a repair ticket A from a payment instrument B if it is the case that A is linked to payment instrument B
effects: Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a payment instrument B, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a repair ticket A from a payment instrument B, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to payment instrument B

link_proposed_correction_to_ticket.description: link a proposed correction B to a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only link a proposed correction B to a repair ticket A if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and B is available and A can link to the proposed correction B
effects: Once I link a proposed correction B to a repair ticket A, it is the case that A is linked to proposed correction B
Once I link a proposed correction B to a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_proposed_correction_from_ticket.description: unlink a proposed correction B from a repair ticket A
preconditions: I can only unlink a proposed correction B from a repair ticket A if it is the case that A is linked to proposed correction B
effects: Once I unlink a proposed correction B from a repair ticket A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a proposed correction B from a repair ticket A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to proposed correction B

validate_ticket_with_scope_and_create_pr.description: validate a repair ticket A with a reconciliation scope B and create proposal for a general ledger account C and a counterparty account D
preconditions: I can only validate a repair ticket A with a reconciliation scope B and create proposal for a general ledger account C and a counterparty account D if it is the case that the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is linked to general ledger account C and A is linked to counterparty account D and B is available and A is linked to the scope B

I can only validate a repair ticket A with a reconciliation scope B and create proposal for a general ledger account C and a counterparty account D if it is not the case that the validation passed flag for A
effects: Once I validate a repair ticket A with a reconciliation scope B and create proposal for a general ledger account C and a counterparty account D, it is the case that A is validated against reconciliation scope B and the validation passed flag for A
Once I validate a repair ticket A with a reconciliation scope B and create proposal for a general ledger account C and a counterparty account D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

validate_ticket_with_payment_and_escalat.description: validate a repair ticket A with a payment instrument C and a reconciliation scope B and escalate with an escalation case D
preconditions: I can only validate a repair ticket A with a payment instrument C and a reconciliation scope B and escalate with an escalation case D if it is the case that the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is linked to payment instrument C and D is open and B is available and A is linked to the scope B and A is linked to the escalation case D
I can only validate a repair ticket A with a payment instrument C and a reconciliation scope B and escalate with an escalation case D if it is not the case that the validation passed flag for A
effects: Once I validate a repair ticket A with a payment instrument C and a reconciliation scope B and escalate with an escalation case D, it is the case that A is validated against reconciliation scope B and the validation passed flag for A and A requires additional evidence and A has been escalated

Once I validate a repair ticket A with a payment instrument C and a reconciliation scope B and escalate with an escalation case D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is open

clear_additional_evidence_flag.description: clear additional evidence flag for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only clear additional evidence flag for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that the validation passed flag for A and A requires additional evidence and A is linked to general ledger account B and A is linked to counterparty account C
effects: Once I clear additional evidence flag for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional evidence and it is not the case anymore that A has been escalated

request_approval_on_proposal.description: request approval on proposal for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B, a counterparty account C, and tagged with a business unit D
preconditions: I can only request approval on proposal for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B, a counterparty account C, and tagged with a business unit D if it is the case that A is ready for proposal and the validation passed flag for A and A is linked to general ledger account B and A is linked to counterparty account C and ticket tagged with A D

I can only request approval on proposal for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B, a counterparty account C, and tagged with a business unit D if it is not the case that A has been escalated and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I request approval on proposal for a repair ticket A linked to a general ledger account B, a counterparty account C, and tagged with a business unit D, it is the case that approval has been requested for A

request_approval_and_escalate.description: request approval and escalate for a repair ticket A linked to a payment instrument B, a proposed correction C, and tagged with an escalation owner D
preconditions: I can only request approval and escalate for a repair ticket A linked to a payment instrument B, a proposed correction C, and tagged with an escalation owner D if it is the case that A is ready for proposal and the validation passed flag for A and A is linked to payment instrument B and A is linked to proposed correction C and ticket tagged with A D

I can only request approval and escalate for a repair ticket A linked to a payment instrument B, a proposed correction C, and tagged with an escalation owner D if it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I request approval and escalate for a repair ticket A linked to a payment instrument B, a proposed correction C, and tagged with an escalation owner D, it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A has been escalated

apply_approval_and_mark_for_execution.description: apply approval and mark a repair ticket A for execution linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only apply approval and mark a repair ticket A for execution linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A has been escalated and A is linked to general ledger account B and A is linked to counterparty account C
effects: Once I apply approval and mark a repair ticket A for execution linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C, it is the case that approval has been granted for A

Once I apply approval and mark a repair ticket A for execution linked to a general ledger account B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that A has been escalated and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for proposal and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional evidence

reopen_ticket_for_additional_evidence.description: reopen a repair ticket A for additional evidence linked to a system reference B with a supporting document C
preconditions: I can only reopen a repair ticket A for additional evidence linked to a system reference B with a supporting document C if it is the case that approval has been granted for A and approval has been requested for A and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and A is linked to the system reference B and C is available
I can only reopen a repair ticket A for additional evidence linked to a system reference B with a supporting document C if it is not the case that A is ready for proposal
effects: Once I reopen a repair ticket A for additional evidence linked to a system reference B with a supporting document C, it is the case that A is ready for proposal

attach_system_reference_document_flag.description: attach system reference document flag to a repair ticket A linked to a system reference B
preconditions: I can only attach system reference document flag to a repair ticket A linked to a system reference B if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A is ready for proposal and A is linked to the system reference B

I can only attach system reference document flag to a repair ticket A linked to a system reference B if it is not the case that A has been escalated and it is not the case that supporting document attached flag is set for A
effects: Once I attach system reference document flag to a repair ticket A linked to a system reference B, it is the case that supporting document attached flag is set for A

attach_counterparty_response_and_flag.description: attach a counterparty response B to a repair ticket A and set supporting document attached flag
preconditions: I can only attach a counterparty response B to a repair ticket A and set supporting document attached flag if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A is ready for proposal and B is available

I can only attach a counterparty response B to a repair ticket A and set supporting document attached flag if it is not the case that A has been escalated and it is not the case that supporting document attached flag is set for A
effects: Once I attach a counterparty response B to a repair ticket A and set supporting document attached flag, it is the case that supporting document attached flag is set for A
Once I attach a counterparty response B to a repair ticket A and set supporting document attached flag, it is not the case anymore that B is available

link_ticket_to_settlement_batch_via_prop.description: link a repair ticket A to a settlement batch B via proposal
preconditions: I can only link a repair ticket A to a settlement batch B via proposal if it is the case that supporting document attached flag is set for A and B is available and A is a candidate for reference in B
effects: Once I link a repair ticket A to a settlement batch B via proposal, it is the case that A is linked to settlement batch B
Once I link a repair ticket A to a settlement batch B via proposal, it is not the case anymore that B is available

confirm_batch_link_for_system_ticket.description: confirm batch link for a system generated ticket A with a client initiated ticket B to a settlement batch C
preconditions: I can only confirm batch link for a system generated ticket A with a client initiated ticket B to a settlement batch C if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and A has a system origin flag and A is a candidate for linking to C and B is linked to settlement batch C
I can only confirm batch link for a system generated ticket A with a client initiated ticket B to a settlement batch C if it is not the case that A is confirmed for linking to C
effects: Once I confirm batch link for a system generated ticket A with a client initiated ticket B to a settlement batch C, it is the case that A is confirmed for linking to C

index_supporting_document_for_closure.description: index a supporting document C for closure of a repair ticket A with a system reference B
preconditions: I can only index a supporting document C for closure of a repair ticket A with a system reference B if it is the case that the ticket A is registered and A has a system origin flag and A is ready for proposal and supporting document attached flag is set for A and A is linked to the system reference B and C is available
I can only index a supporting document C for closure of a repair ticket A with a system reference B if it is not the case that evidence for A is indexed
effects: Once I index a supporting document C for closure of a repair ticket A with a system reference B, it is the case that evidence for A is indexed

mark_ticket_precheck_for_closure.description: mark a repair ticket A precheck for closure
preconditions: I can only mark a repair ticket A precheck for closure if it is the case that A has a precheck flag and the ticket A is registered and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and the validation passed flag for A and approval has been requested for A and supporting document attached flag is set for A and A is ready for proposal
I can only mark a repair ticket A precheck for closure if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I mark a repair ticket A precheck for closure, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_ticket_resolution_with_batch.description: finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with a settlement batch B
preconditions: I can only finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with a settlement batch B if it is the case that A has a system origin flag and the ticket A is registered and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and the validation passed flag for A and approval has been requested for A and supporting document attached flag is set for A and A is ready for proposal and A is confirmed for linking to B
I can only finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with a settlement batch B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with a settlement batch B, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_ticket_resolution_with_indexed_.description: finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with indexed evidence
preconditions: I can only finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with indexed evidence if it is the case that A has a system origin flag and the ticket A is registered and the ticket assignment flag for A is set and the validation passed flag for A and approval has been requested for A and supporting document attached flag is set for A and A is ready for proposal and evidence for A is indexed
I can only finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with indexed evidence if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize resolution of a repair ticket A with indexed evidence, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_analyst_to_ticket: assign reconciliation analyst {?reconciliation_analyst} to repair ticket {?repair_ticket}
action_nl_templates.release_analyst_from_ticket: release reconciliation analyst {?reconciliation_analyst} from repair ticket {?repair_ticket}
action_nl_templates.link_system_reference_to_ticket: link system reference {?system_reference} to repair ticket {?repair_ticket}
action_nl_templates.unlink_system_reference_from_ticket: unlink system reference {?system_reference} from repair ticket {?repair_ticket}
action_nl_templates.validate_ticket_with_system_reference: validate repair ticket {?repair_ticket} with system reference {?system_reference}
action_nl_templates.validate_ticket_with_counterparty_respon: validate repair ticket {?repair_ticket} with counterparty response {?counterparty_response}
action_nl_templates.attach_supporting_document_and_mark_read: attach supporting document {?supporting_document} to repair ticket {?repair_ticket} and mark repair ticket {?repair_ticket} as ready for proposal with system reference {?system_reference}
action_nl_templates.attach_proposed_correction_via_batch_con: attach proposed correction to repair ticket {?repair_ticket} via batch confirmation with settlement batch {?settlement_batch}
action_nl_templates.link_general_ledger_account_to_ticket: link repair ticket {?repair_ticket} to general ledger account {?general_ledger_account}
action_nl_templates.unlink_general_ledger_account_from_ticke: unlink repair ticket {?repair_ticket} from general ledger account {?general_ledger_account}

action_nl_templates.unlink_payment_instrument_from_ticket: unlink repair ticket {?repair_ticket} from payment instrument {?payment_instrument}

action_nl_templates.unlink_proposed_correction_from_ticket: unlink proposed correction {?proposed_correction} from repair ticket {?repair_ticket}

action_nl_templates.request_approval_on_proposal: request approval on proposal for repair ticket {?repair_ticket} linked to general ledger account {?general_ledger_account}, counterparty account {?counterparty_account}, and tagged with business unit {?business_unit}

action_nl_templates.finalize_ticket_resolution_with_indexed_: finalize resolution of repair ticket {?repair_ticket} with indexed evidence

predicate_nl_templates.ticket_candidate_analyst: {?repair_ticket} is a candidate for the analyst {?reconciliation_analyst}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a repair ticket or a reconciliation analyst or a reconciliation scope or a counterparty account or a general ledger account or a payment instrument or a system reference or a counterparty response or a settlement batch or a supporting document or a escalation case or a proposed correction or a aux object is also a object
Everything that is a business unit or a escalation owner is also a aux object
Everything that is a client initiated ticket or a system generated ticket is also a repair ticket
